hooks.command:
$date = Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd'; $time = Get-Date -Format 'HH:mm'; $dir = 'context/History_log'; if (!(Test-Path $dir)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dir | Out-Null }; $file = "$dir/$date.md"; if (!(Test-Path $file)) { Set-Content -Path $file -Value "# History Log — $date`n" -Encoding utf8 }; $changed = git diff --name-only HEAD 2>$null; if (!$changed) { $changed = (git status --short 2>$null) -join "`n" }; $entry = "`n---`n`n## $time`n`n### Files changed`n``````
$changed`n``````
"; Add-Content -Path $file -Value $entry -Encoding utf8
